title: YTPMV: Sonic Favors The Mario Series
description:
mp3: http://www.mediafire.com/?xjmyf1fyzl0
Aha! So Sonic has been keeping this a secret has he? All that "Genesis does what Nintendon't" was just a cover to hide that Sonic liked Mario's games more! For shame!

Mario may seem like a jerk at the end, but his harsh words are justified! Mario sees past Sonic's attempts at brown-nosing, and thus threatens him with the taking away of his video-game funds.

So yeah, this is a sequel to Link Favors the Kirby Series. Same formula. This one took longer, probably cause I had a ton of school stuff to do for a while. Will I make another one of these? You bet.

Credit goes to Kirbopher15 and KagomeHigurashi for making Brawl Taunts.
